name: Immutable
description: Web3 gaming platform offering zkEVM, zkRollups, passport identity, orderbook and marketplace APIs for zero-gas NFTs.

seo.title: Immutable — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Immutable: Web3 gaming platform offering zkEVM, zkRollups, passport identity, orderbook and marketplace APIs for zero-gas NFTs.

when_to_use: Zero-gas NFT minting and trading on Immutable zkEVM
Web3 game marketplace APIs with onchain order books
Passport identity for unified player identity across web3 games
zkRollup gaming blockchain with permissionless contract deploy
Building blockchain games without gas fees for players

pros: Passport is a clean identity layer
review.verdict: The most credible L2 for web3 games today, at the cost of betting on Immutable's ecosystem.
review.best_for: Game studios building web3 titles needing gasless NFT UX
review.not_for: Non-gaming dApps or teams avoiding single-chain lock-in

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
